defaultLabels.description: Labels applied to every alert rule. Per-reminder labels take precedence.

reminders.description: List of static date-based alert rules. No PrometheusRule is created when empty.

alert.description: Prometheus alert name used for routing and deduplication.

summary.description: Short human-readable summary shown in alert notifications.

description.description: Detailed description explaining context and impact.

datetime.description: Expiry date in dd.mm.yyyy or dd.mm.yyyy HH:MM format. Time defaults to 00:00 when omitted.

daysBeforeExpiry.description: Days before the expiry date to fire the warning alert. Default: 30.

critical.description: If true, adds a second alert (<alert>Critical) with severity: critical firing when fewer than 1 day remains.

labels.description: Per-alert label overrides merged over defaultLabels.
